title: The Quakening
description: Modpack that turns Minecraft into a Quake-Like, or Quake Inspired game. Includes Scorched Guns, Create, and more!
body:
![TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aa81e4a47a7a1ebb0a237924d9ad9fbfd15decc.png)


The Quakening is a full Minecraft Modpack heavily inspired by the popular ID Software title "Quake"! From gun play, to industrial creation, and exploration, this modpack will surely scratch that Quake itch you so needed.

## Notable features include :

Quake Movement Mechanics

Scorched Guns

Create + Addons

and so, so many monsters!

This pack is currently in Beta, and we plan to add more content such as custom music and more as time goes. We hope you enjoy this experience!



Any feedback would be appreciated.
